---
title: "Homepage"
---
# Placeholder photo
photo of me

# About Me
I am a Applied AI student studying at the Singapore Institute Of Technology(SIT).

During my diploma studies it provided me with valuable experience in topics such as Web Applications development, Data Structures and Algorithms and Machine Learning which I hope I can apply to my studies in SIT as well

In my last year at Ngee Ann Polytechnic, I went for a five month internship at PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC), where I mainly worked on Internal Applications Development using Microsoft PowerApps. Here I was able to hone my programming and problem-solving skills, through real world client interaction and continuous feedback regarding features and bugs during development. I was also able to be exposed to the software development workflows used in the industry.
